statement: Square local observables reported at publication-grade quadrature resolution
status: SUPPORTED: continuum_elliptic_dos canonical (n_eps=2001 certified vs 8001 to <=1.04e-5 at interacting points). v2 FULL-GRID gate: ONLY Omega/D and n pass 0.1% at Nk64; Z, D_occ, and ALL energies require the continuum route (v1 cold-metal-only was too lenient).

statement: Finite-pole DMFT-ED converges to CTQMC with N_b (LLK)
status: SUPPORTED via DIRECT LLK Fig-3 (dashed=DMFT-ED) comparison (21/21). This module is DMFT-ED (dashed), NOT the g-RISB (gem) side.
